agent_name.description: Name of the agent or representative

customer_name.description: Name of the customer or caller

main_topics.description: Main topics or issues discussed in the call

outcomes.description: Resolutions or outcomes achieved during the call

action_items.description: Follow-up actions with responsible party and optional due context

due.description: Due date or timeframe if mentioned, else null

sentiment.description: Overall sentiment of the call from the customer's perspective

reference_ids.description: Policy numbers, claim IDs, or other reference identifiers mentioned
